Non-Dollar Savings Configuration
Configure annual non-dollar savings per robot. Values appear on the Executive dashboard, Site Compare, and Executive Summary export. Use industry benchmarks below as a starting point, then adjust for your specific environment.
⚡ Industry Benchmark Presets
Select a robot program type to auto-fill with published industry benchmarks. Sources: BLS Occupational Outlook, EPA LDAR studies, McKinsey Robot ROI report 2023, BST Safety Analytics.
Select a preset above to auto-fill industry-validated benchmarks with source citations.
⏱ Labor Hours Saved
per robot / year
hrs/yr
Operator hours freed from manual inspection rounds, data collection, and compliance walks. Industry range: 520–2,080 hrs/robot/yr — select a preset above to load benchmark values with source citations.
🌿 CO₂ Reduction
per robot / year
metric tons/yr
Reduced fugitive emissions from faster LDAR detection + eliminated vehicle trips for manual rounds. EPA LDAR studies: 8–35 tons CO₂e/unit/yr at refinery scale.
🛡 Incidents Avoided
per robot / year
events/yr
Near-misses, recordable incidents, and confined-space entries eliminated by robot substitution. BST Analytics: 2–8 incidents/robot/yr in high-hazard environments.
📋 Compliance Hours Saved
per robot / year
hrs/yr
Audit prep, report generation, and regulatory documentation hours replaced by automated robot data logs. EPA/OSHA reporting burden: 260–1,040 hrs/robot/yr at complex sites.

Active Standards
ISO 10218 · ROBOT SAFETY
Requirements for industrial robot safety — design, construction, protective measures.
10218-1 Design10218-2 IntegrationTS 15066 Cobot

Security for IoT-connected robot fleets and Digital Twin integration.
62443-2-1 Policy62443-3-3 System62443-4-2 Component
EPA SUBPART BB / J · LDAR
Robotic inspection substitutes for manual operator rounds under LDAR programs.
Subpart BBSubpart JMethod 21
OSHA / HSE · WORKER SAFETY
Confined space entry reduction, acoustic monitoring, PSM compliance.
29 CFR 1910.146PSM InspectionATEX Zone

Global Labor Rate Reference
Market-rate operator / technician labor rates by country for robotic operations. Rates auto-populate when a site is added with a matching country. Source: BLS, Eurostat, industry benchmarks 2024–2025.
CountryOperator Rate ($/hr)Tech Rate ($/hr)Engineer Rate ($/hr)Status
Active Site Labor Rates
Current operator rates applied per site. Auto-populated from the reference table when sites are added. Override individually in the site settings.

Define a new robot program type. The system will auto-complete compliance standards, playbook templates, and schedule templates based on the robot type you select.

Active Custom Programs
⚡ Live API Connections
Configure real-time data connections per robot, or use Auto-Discover to point PRISM at any robot/fleet API — it fingerprints the vendor, infers the field mapping, and onboards robots automatically. API keys are stored in sessionStorage only — they clear when the tab closes and are never written to localStorage or logs.
Connection Log
No connections logged yet.
🔐 Active Session
OAuth 2.0 / PKCE Configuration
Configure an external identity provider (Azure AD, Okta, Auth0, Google Workspace). When enabled, the local access key login is replaced by your IdP's OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow.

Built-in PRISM roles and their permissions. Use this reference when mapping IdP groups below.
RoleDashboard AccessConfigExportE-StopData Edit
AdminAll dashboardsFull accessAll formatsArm + triggerCreate, edit, delete
OperatorOperator, Plant, MissionsFleet + Field Ops onlyCSV, MissionsArm + triggerMissions, actuals only
FinanceExecutive, Finance, CompareFinancial params onlyAll formatsView onlyFinancial overrides only
ViewerAll dashboards (read-only)NonePDF onlyView onlyNone

Data Infrastructure · UNS Topology
Online Degraded / Checking… Offline / Error Not configured
Tiles reflect live pipeline status · amber/red tiles are not yet functioning — use the action to enable or connect them · ⚙ chooses which tiles show
Online Partial Offline Standby
Drag nodes to rearrange (admin) · click a node for component detail · edges animate while telemetry flows · edit the schema under the 🧬 Data Schema tab
Platform Tiers & Entitlements · Super Admin
Manages the global tier/add-on catalog and each org's entitlement. These calls use the platform super-admin key (never the signed-in session token / JWT) — it is held only in this tab's memory and is never written to localStorage.
Vendor Comparison · By Program & Use Case
Compare leading vendor solutions for each robot program. Pricing reflects market rates as of — . Select a program, then a use case to see how vendors stack up on capabilities, cost, and fit-for-purpose.

🧩 Solution Builder — tell us the problem, we'll design the fix
You don't need to know robots. Tell us what's costing you time, money or risk — PRISM designs the platform + sensor solution and shows the ROI math in full.

🤖 Robot Solution Finder
🏭 Pilot Site Configuration Phase 4.1–4.2
Mark sites as pilot sites to enable beta feature flags and collect structured field feedback for those deployments.
🚩 Feature Flags Phase 4.3
Gradually activate features for pilot users before general rollout. Changes take effect immediately.
⚡ Performance Profiler Phase 4.7
Real-time render performance metrics for field device testing.
🔒 Security Audit Checklist Phase 4.8
Complete before Phase 5 production launch. All P0 items are hard blockers.
🧪 Automated QA Suite Steps 1.8 + 2.8
Verifies all Phase 1–3 mobile deliverables. Run on each target device before sign-off.
Click "Run All Tests" to begin. Tests run in-browser on the current device.

Integration Hub v11 · F4

Connectors · inbound systems → PRISM
Outbound Webhooks · PRISM alerts → your endpoints (n8n / Make / Zapier)
Benchmarks v11 · F9
Loading benchmarks…
Outliers · cohorts more than 2σ from the group on the selected metric
Cohort Comparison
Auto-Scheduler v11 · F3
Loading proposals…
The scheduler proposes a robot for each unassigned planned mission (event-triggered demand included), scored on priority, robot health, site affinity and estimated runtime. It never dispatches directly — a proposal auto-applies after the grace window unless you override it. Every apply and override is audited.
Human-Robot Collaboration v11 · F8
Draw exclusion / handoff / coworking zones per site. Robots never enter an exclusion zone. A coworking/handoff zone holds robots until every listed human has acknowledged the block — commands and scheduled missions into a held zone are safely refused, and a live-position breach fires a critical alert.
Geofences
Coworking blocks
Incidents v11 · F10
A critical alert auto-opens an incident and matches it against a playbook by failure signature. Work the checklist — every step tick is audited — then capture the resolution to improve future matching.
Loading incidents…
Welcome to PRISMFirst-run setup · v10.7
1
2
3
4
5
6
Workspace setup is managed by administrators.
Please ask an administrator to run the setup wizard or adjust branding.
Set up PRISM for your organization
Give the workspace your company identity. You can change any of this later from the Config tab.
Logo
Logo
Brand colors are applied on top of both the light and dark themes.
Choose your data schema
How robot telemetry and events are structured across your Unified Namespace.
Design your network architecture
Tell PRISM about your deployment and it recommends a full UNS data stack for you. Every pick stays editable below — ⭐ marks the PRISM STANDARD option (most prebuilt integrations).
Edge / UNS broker
Flow engine
Streaming backbone
Lakehouse table format
What industry are you in?
PRISM pre-loads a matching regulatory rule set and a few starter use-case templates. You can change the rule set anytime from CONFIG → Compliance, and every template is fully editable.
Connect your systems
PRISM connects to your robot fleets and the business systems around them. This step is optional — you can wire everything up any time from the Integrations tab. Credentials are stored securely on the server and never in this browser.
Robot fleets (pull telemetry & send commands)
Generic HTTP Fleet
Poll any fleet API that exposes JSON robot state — a field map renames vendor keys onto PRISM's telemetry shape.
Boston Dynamics Orbit
Spot Enterprise fleets over the Orbit fleet-management REST API — live status plus pause / resume / return commands.
ROS 2 (rosbridge) Reference
ROS 2 / Gazebo fleets over rosbridge — the reference & simulation adapter, great for a staging or demo fleet.
Business systems (event-driven automation)
Webhooks n8n · Make · Zapier
Accept HMAC-signed events from any system; a trigger rule can turn one into a mission — with the same compliance gate as a manual mission.
CMMS / Work Orders
Maximo, Fiix, UpKeep … a created work order can dispatch an inspection mission automatically.
Inventory / WMS · IoT · Weather
Low-stock, sensor-threshold or high-wind advisories can raise an alert or dispatch (or hold) the right mission.
Adding a connector needs an admin sign-in and a running PRISM server — the Integration Hub walks you through endpoints, credentials and signing secrets.
Register your fleet now optional
Create a site, add your robots, and mint a machine API key — everything a bridge like scripts/roborock-bridge (or any HTTP/telemetry client) needs to start streaming. The key is shown once below; it is never saved in this browser.
Robots
Review & launch
Confirm your workspace configuration. ⭐ marks PRISM STANDARD picks (most prebuilt integrations).
